text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is a branch of computer science that aims to create machines capable of performing tasks that normally require human intelligence. This includes learning, problem-solving, and decision-making. A key part of AI is machine learning, where computers improve their performance through experience, without being explicitly programmed for every step. Deep learning is a more advanced version of this, using complex networks inspired by the human brain to analyze large amounts of data. Today, AI is common in daily life. It powers virtual assistants, recommends movies and products, helps with navigation, and even detects fraud in banking.
